lanes.name: Source Discovery Inventory
lanes.purpose: List the fastest public source families for CoinFox packet ideas, with Reddit broken out as a major lane.
lanes.operator_action: Run the inventory before building packet intake so source discovery starts broad and stays public-safe.
lanes.safety_boundary: Discovery is not permission to scrape, score sources, publish, or treat social heat as truth.

lanes.name: Interaction Potential Scoring
lanes.purpose: Rank packet observations by likely comments, challenges, saves, and thesis debate.
lanes.operator_action: Score candidate observations before deciding which CoinFox prompts to draft first.
lanes.safety_boundary: Interaction potential is ranking only; it cannot change truth, evidence, source reliability, or publishing authority.

lanes.name: Manual Public Packet Intake
lanes.purpose: Turn public observations into a reviewed CoinFox curated packet worksheet.
lanes.operator_action: Use public links and summaries only; preserve counterpoints and outcome questions.
lanes.safety_boundary: No raw Discord text, credentials, private IDs, or live authority.

lanes.name: Source Registry Guard
lanes.purpose: Apply known-source defaults before raw intake can influence packet rendering.
lanes.operator_action: Keep unknown and social sources quarantined unless independently corroborated.
lanes.safety_boundary: Trusted provenance never bypasses prompt-injection scanning.

lanes.name: Packet Soak And Trust Metadata
lanes.purpose: Prove allowed/quarantined edge cases and public-safe trust labels.
lanes.operator_action: Run the soak tests before changing intake or trust-label behavior.
lanes.safety_boundary: Trust metadata is review-only; it has no confidence score or reputation authority.

lanes.name: Trusted Evidence Intake
lanes.purpose: Record context-only trusted evidence packets for Forecast Desk workflows.
lanes.operator_action: Use only when a reviewed local Forecast Desk DB target is explicit.
lanes.safety_boundary: Trusted people can submit context; they cannot set probability or authority.

lanes.name: Microscope Private Preview
lanes.purpose: Privately inspect accepted-candidate summaries when a reviewed local DB exists.
lanes.operator_action: Use list/preview only; do not stage public cards until parser inventory is reviewed.
lanes.safety_boundary: Private previews are not CoinFox publishing, parser mutation, or execution.

lanes.name: CoinFox Public Post Bridge
lanes.purpose: Let public CoinFox posts become reviewed observations after the CoinFox repo owns posting.
lanes.operator_action: For now, manually summarize public CoinFox posts into the packet intake worksheet.
lanes.safety_boundary: CoinFox popularity is attention only, never truth or source reliability.

lanes.name: Apollo 2 Legacy Discord Parser
lanes.purpose: Inventory and possibly port useful parser behavior from the old A2 runtime later.
lanes.operator_action: Do not connect Discord or copy parser code into Core while A2 is unavailable.
lanes.safety_boundary: Private Discord content cannot cross into public packets.

lanes.name: Live Source Automation
lanes.purpose: Automate public source collection only after manual packets and outcome review are useful.
lanes.operator_action: Stay manual-first; add source adapters one by one after boundaries are explicit.
lanes.safety_boundary: No scraping, credentials, private feeds, or API authority in this fallback pass.
